objective: Use imagegen to re-imagine CleanMac's current design, then implement the refreshed visual direction on a fresh branch from latest origin/main.
exit_condition: The goal is complete when the branch is based on latest origin/main, the current UI/design context has been inspected, an imagegen concept has been generated and saved or referenced for the implementation, focused failing tests or source guards cover the intended UI/design behavior before production changes, the refreshed design is implemented in the app, verification commands pass, .loopgoal/state.json records the final state, and the intended changes are committed.

phases.name: Branch from latest origin/main and initialize checkpoint
Inspect current UI structure and runtime design surface
Generate imagegen visual concept and distill implementable direction
Add failing tests/source guards for the design change

current.focus: GOAL complete after follow-up design comparison. Imagegen concept was generated and saved at docs/design/assets/reimagined-cleanmac-dashboard.png. SwiftUI implementation now uses paper sidebar chrome, a non-blurred paper-texture background, real bundled hand-drawn PNG assets, a top disk dashboard card, metric row, scan CTA strip, four feature cards, and a localized trust strip for Local AI, Move to Trash, No Telemetry, and No Cloud Upload. Tests were red first, then green. Final follow-up verification: git diff --check passed; env CLANG_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=/tmp/cleanmac-clang-cache swift test passed with 102 XCTest tests and 12 Swift Testing tests; ./script/build_and_run.sh --verify exited 0; pgrep found dist/CleanMac.app/Contents/MacOS/CleanMac running as PID 18873.
current.next_action: Stop scheduling after committing the implementation.

decisions.reason: The user asked for a result-driven design re-imagination and implementation, not a recurring time-based loop.
The user explicitly requested latest remote main before cutting the branch.

decisions.decision: Stash the previous .loopgoal/state.json working-tree edit before switching branches.
decisions.reason: It belonged to a completed earlier goal and would otherwise pollute this new checkpoint; stash preserves it without discarding user-visible state.

decisions.decision: Remove the clean old worktree .claude/worktrees/busy-noether-2200b2 and reset generated .build/dist artifacts.
decisions.reason: SwiftPM verification initially failed because the volume had only about 114 MiB free; the old worktree had no uncommitted changes and freeing it allowed a real baseline test run.

decisions.decision: Keep implementation centered on the existing playful desktop utility design language.
decisions.reason: Repo design docs, assets, and explorer evidence point to thick ink outlines, warm paper panels, colorful feature badges, local AI second opinion, Move to Trash safety, privacy, and safety-rule trust as the product identity.

decisions.decision: Use the imagegen output as an implementation reference rather than a pixel-perfect target.
decisions.reason: The generated mockup was strongest as a direction for shell, dashboard, and trust affordances; the production code should keep existing data flow, localization, and SwiftUI components intact.

decisions.decision: Add source and pixel guards before production changes.
decisions.reason: The first CleanMacUITests run failed on paper sidebar brightness, dashboard trust-strip source expectations, and blurred background/source expectations, proving the new tests described missing behavior before implementation.

decisions.decision: Localize trust-strip copy across all 11 app locales.
decisions.reason: The new trust labels are user-visible and the repo's localization tests require every static L10n key to exist in every .lproj resource.

decisions.decision: Treat the first implementation as insufficient after comparing the generated mockup and actual snapshot.
decisions.reason: The actual UI still used the old vertical layout and SF Symbol fallbacks, so it did not match the imagegen concept closely enough.

decisions.decision: Load illustration PNGs from the SwiftPM bundle root instead of the Images subdirectory.
decisions.reason: .process("Resources") flattened the image files into CleanMac_CleanMac.bundle, so the previous subdirectory lookup silently fell back to SF Symbols.

decisions.decision: Rework ScanView into the imagegen dashboard structure.
decisions.reason: The mockup's main reusable structure is top disk dashboard card, metric row, scan CTA, four feature cards, and trust strip; tests now guard those components.
